nodes.name: 鸽形目

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Timor imperial pigeon
nodes.summary: The Timor imperial pigeon (Ducula cineracea) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is found on Timor and Wetar. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet: Ducula cineracea (Timor imperial pigeon)
nodes.shortSummary: The Timor imperial pigeon (Ducula cineracea) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is found on Timor and Wetar.
